address: 3301 Magazine St, 1114 Toledano St, 1114 Toledano St Apt 201, 1114 Toledano St Apt 202
description: RENOVATION AND EXPANSION OF AN EXISTING 1-STORY, 2,426 SF COMMERCIAL BUILDING TO INCLUDE A NEW SECOND STORY AND A TWO-STORY REAR ADDITION FOR A TOTAL OF 7045 SF. THE RECONFIGURED BUILDING WILL FEATURE A GROUND-FLOOR COMMERCIAL TENANT SPACE (TO BE BUILT OUT UNDER SEPARATE PERMITS) AND BUSINESS OCCUPANCY ON THE SECOND FLOOR (ALSO REQUIRING SEPARATE PERMITS TO BUILD OUT). SCOPE OF WORK INCLUDES SELECTIVE DEMOLITION, INSTALLATION OF NEW PILINGS AND FOUNDATIONS, CONVENTIONAL STEEL FRAMING, INTERIOR PARTITIONS, AND NEW PLUMBING, MECHANICAL, AND ELECTRICAL SYSTEMS. ALL WORK TO BE DONE AS PER PLANS BBSA NO. 23-25 APPROVAL GRANTED FOR EXISTING FIRST FLOOR ELEVATION TO REMAIN AT +5.38’ N.A.V.D. HDLC – Ref Code: Y1Y0AY Partial demolition was approved in January 2023. The redesigned project has since been reviewed by Dennis Murphy, who confirmed it remains in compliance. The HDLC demolition permit is still active through January 2026. CPC – Design Advisory Committee – Ref Code: GKGR1V The revised project went before the DAC in May 2025 and received conditional approval, with the remaining items to be addressed at the staff level
